name: io.github.Lab94/frenchie-skill
title: Frenchie
description: OCR, transcription, and image generation for AI agents via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: FRENCHIE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Frenchie API key (starts with fr_). Create one at https://getfrenchie.dev/dashboard/api-keys — first signup comes with 100 free credits.

environmentVariables.name: FRENCHIE_DEFAULT_LANGUAGE
environmentVariables.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language hint (e.g. 'th', 'en', 'ja') applied to transcribe_to_markdown when the tool input does not specify a language. Tool-level language always wins.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer fr_... — your Frenchie API key

headers.name: X-Frenchie-Default-Language
headers.description: Optional ISO 639-1 language hint (e.g. 'th', 'en', 'ja') applied to transcribe_to_markdown when the tool input does not specify a language. Tool-level language always wins.
